BABELE.TranslateActorHint: Automatically translates all the owned items of the actor for which there is a translated compendium
BABELE.ExportDirectoryNotes: Export translation starter files from the compendium directory. You can include compendium folder files, bulk compendium exports, or both in the same zip.
BABELE.ExportDirectoryPackModeAllHint: Export every available compendium without selecting them manually.
BABELE.ExportDirectoryPackModeSelectedHi: Show the list below and export only the compendiums you choose.
BABELE.ExportDirectoryPackageModeAllHint: Export one `_packs-folders` file for every available package root.
BABELE.ExportDirectoryPackageModeSelecte: Show the list below and export only the package roots you choose.
BABELE.ExportDirectoryPackFoldersHint: Each generated `_packs-folders` file covers the root compendium folders for one package.
BABELE.ExportDirectoryNoPacks: No exportable compendiums are currently available.
BABELE.ExportDirectoryNoPackages: No synthetic `_packs-folders` sources are currently available.
BABELE.ExportPackFoldersNotes: Export starter files for compendium folder translations. These files are package-scoped and cover the compendium-directory folders shown in the sidebar.
BABELE.ExportPackFoldersNoPackages: No compendium-directory folders are currently available for `_packs-folders` export.
BABELE.ExportTranslationNotes: Choose the export format and which entries to include in the generated translation file.
BABELE.ExportTranslationFormatCompatible: Recommended. Exports the canonical object-based format, better suited for modern translation workflows.
BABELE.ExportTranslationFormatLegacyDepr: Deprecated. Will be removed in a future major version.
BABELE.ExportTranslationFileDetectedHint: Babele found a translation file matching this compendium. You can therefore choose whether to export all entries with current translated values, all source-language entries, only those already present in that file, or only the missing ones.
BABELE.ExportTranslationSelectionAllHint: Export both entries already present in the translation file and entries still missing from it.
BABELE.ExportTranslationSelectionSourceH: Export every entry using the current source-language values only.
BABELE.ExportTranslationNoTranslations: No loaded translations were found for this compendium. Export will include source-language entries only.
BABELE.TranslationDirHint: Enter the directory where the compendium's local translation files are located
BABELE.EnableTranslationExportHint: Enable this option if you want to add a button on each compendium to generate the translation file, useful as a startup template
BABELE.ShowOriginalNameHint: Shows the untranslated name of the compendium's item in addition to the translated one. This will also allow you to filter by the original name along with the translated one in the search widget.
BABELE.ShowTranslateOptionHint: Toggles the translate option on the actor sheets.
BABELE.WarnMissingPathsHint: Enables diagnostic warnings when a static translation targets a source path that is not present in the original document data.
BABELE.requireLibWrapperMessage: Babele requires the 'libWrapper' module. Please install and activate it.
